CustomField.description: used to determine if the merge flag should be set to true. ( From JIra ITSFDC-3499)
CustomField.formula: OR( RecordType.Name = 'Prospect' , AND( RecordType.Name = 'Customer' , CONTAINS("0001,ZBR1,OMIT,SFDC", PKI_SAP_Account_Group__c) , CONTAINS("Approved,SFDC,SAP,Requested", MDM_Status__c) , NOT(CONTAINS(Name,'*IDLE*')) , PKI_SAP_Marked_for_Deletion__c = FALSE ) ) /*Contains formula in reverse order allows taking the known list and see if pick list is part of it*/
CustomField.inlineHelpText: used to determine if the merge flag should be set to true. ( From JIra ITSFDC-3499)
CustomField.label: fxSetMergeFlag
